# Connector Service — LLM Navigation Index
# Connectors: 76
#
# This file helps AI coding assistants navigate connector-service documentation.
# Each connector block lists: doc path, scenarios, supported payment methods,
# supported flows, and paths to runnable Python/JavaScript examples.
#
# Usage: fetch this file first, then fetch the specific connector doc or example.

overview:
  total_connectors: 76
  docs_root: docs/connectors/
  examples_root: examples/
  all_connectors_matrix: docs/all_connector.md

integration_pattern:
  1. Configure ConnectorConfig with connector name and credentials
  2. Call flows in sequence per scenario (see Integration Scenarios in connector doc)
  3. Branch on response.status: AUTHORIZED / PENDING / FAILED
  4. PENDING means await webhook or poll Get before capturing
  5. Pass connector_transaction_id from Authorize response to Capture/Refund

---

## ACI
connector_id: aci
doc: docs/connectors/aci.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, refund, recurring, void_payment, get_payment
payment_methods: Affirm, Afterpay, Card, Ideal, Klarna
flows: authorize, capture, get, recurring_charge, refund, setup_recurring, void
examples_python: examples/aci/python/checkout_card.py, examples/aci/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/aci/python/refund.py, examples/aci/python/recurring.py, examples/aci/python/void_payment.py, examples/aci/python/get_payment.py

## Adyen
connector_id: adyen
doc: docs/connectors/adyen.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, checkout_wallet, checkout_bank, refund, recurring, void_payment
payment_methods: Ach, Affirm, Afterpay, ApplePay, Bacs, Blik, Card, GooglePay, Ideal, Klarna, Sepa
flows: authorize, capture, dispute_accept, dispute_defend, dispute_submit_evidence, recurring_charge, refund, setup_recurring, void
examples_python: examples/adyen/python/checkout_card.py, examples/adyen/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/adyen/python/checkout_wallet.py, examples/adyen/python/checkout_bank.py, examples/adyen/python/refund.py, examples/adyen/python/recurring.py, examples/adyen/python/void_payment.py

## Razorpay V2
connector_id: razorpayv2
doc: docs/connectors/razorpayv2.md
scenarios: checkout_autocapture, checkout_wallet, checkout_bank, refund, get_payment
payment_methods: Ach, Affirm, Afterpay, ApplePay, Bacs, Becs, Blik, Card, GooglePay, Ideal, Klarna, PaypalRedirect, Sepa, UpiCollect
flows: authorize, create_order, get, refund
examples_python: examples/razorpayv2/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/razorpayv2/python/checkout_wallet.py, examples/razorpayv2/python/checkout_bank.py, examples/razorpayv2/python/refund.py, examples/razorpayv2/python/get_payment.py

## Redsys
connector_id: redsys
doc: docs/connectors/redsys.md
scenarios: none
payment_methods: none
flows: 
examples_python: none

## Revolut
connector_id: revolut
doc: docs/connectors/revolut.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, checkout_wallet, checkout_bank, refund, get_payment
payment_methods: Ach, Affirm, Afterpay, ApplePay, Bacs, Becs, Blik, Card, GooglePay, Ideal, Klarna, PaypalRedirect, Sepa, UpiCollect
flows: authorize, capture, get, refund
examples_python: examples/revolut/python/checkout_card.py, examples/revolut/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/revolut/python/checkout_wallet.py, examples/revolut/python/checkout_bank.py, examples/revolut/python/refund.py, examples/revolut/python/get_payment.py

## Revolv3
connector_id: revolv3
doc: docs/connectors/revolv3.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, refund, void_payment
payment_methods: Card
flows: authorize, capture, refund, setup_recurring, void
examples_python: examples/revolv3/python/checkout_card.py, examples/revolv3/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/revolv3/python/refund.py, examples/revolv3/python/void_payment.py

## Shift4
connector_id: shift4
doc: docs/connectors/shift4.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, refund, get_payment
payment_methods: Card, Ideal
flows: authorize, capture, get, refund
examples_python: examples/shift4/python/checkout_card.py, examples/shift4/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/shift4/python/refund.py, examples/shift4/python/get_payment.py

## Silverflow

doc: docs/connectors/silverflow.md

flows: authorize, capture, get, refund, void
examples_python: examples/silverflow/python/checkout_card.py, examples/silverflow/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/silverflow/python/refund.py, examples/silverflow/python/void_payment.py, examples/silverflow/python/get_payment.py

## Stax
connector_id: stax
doc: docs/connectors/stax.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, checkout_bank, refund, void_payment, get_payment, create_customer, tokenize
payment_methods: Ach, Bacs, Becs, Card, Sepa
flows: authorize, capture, create_customer, get, refund, tokenize, void
examples_python: examples/stax/python/checkout_card.py, examples/stax/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/stax/python/checkout_bank.py, examples/stax/python/refund.py, examples/stax/python/void_payment.py, examples/stax/python/get_payment.py, examples/stax/python/create_customer.py, examples/stax/python/tokenize.py

## Stripe
connector_id: stripe
doc: docs/connectors/stripe.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, checkout_wallet, checkout_bank, refund, recurring, void_payment, get_payment, create_customer, tokenize
payment_methods: Ach, Affirm, Afterpay, ApplePay, Bacs, Becs, Blik, Card, GooglePay, Ideal, Klarna, Sepa
flows: authorize, capture, create_customer, get, recurring_charge, refund, setup_recurring, tokenize, void
examples_python: examples/stripe/python/checkout_card.py, examples/stripe/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/stripe/python/checkout_wallet.py, examples/stripe/python/checkout_bank.py, examples/stripe/python/refund.py, examples/stripe/python/recurring.py, examples/stripe/python/void_payment.py, examples/stripe/python/get_payment.py, examples/stripe/python/create_customer.py, examples/stripe/python/tokenize.py

flows: create_access_token, get
examples_python: none

## TrustPay
connector_id: trustpay
doc: docs/connectors/trustpay.md
scenarios: checkout_autocapture, refund, get_payment
payment_methods: Blik, Card, Ideal
flows: authorize, create_access_token, create_order, get, refund
examples_python: examples/trustpay/python/checkout_autocapture.py, examples/trustpay/python/refund.py, examples/trustpay/python/get_payment.py

## Worldpay
connector_id: worldpay
doc: docs/connectors/worldpay.md
scenarios: checkout_card, checkout_autocapture, checkout_wallet, refund, void_payment, get_payment
payment_methods: ApplePay, Card, GooglePay
flows: authorize, capture, get, recurring_charge, refund, void

doc: docs/connectors/worldpayvantiv.md
